Decoding The Words

LoginBuy Book
The Core System

W-O-R-D

A four-step transformational framework to escape the social trap and build a life of purpose.

सामाजिक जालोबाट बाहिर निस्कने चार चरणको रूपान्तरण ढाँचा
W
Wisdom
बुद्धिमत्त

The power of consciously choosing the words you speak to yourself and others.

आफूलाई र अरूलाई भन्ने शब्दहरू सचेत रूपमा छनोट गर्ने क्षमता।

How to Apply

  • 1Replace 'I can't' with 'I am learning to'
  • 2Replace 'I have to' with 'I choose to'
  • 3Replace 'This is hard' with 'This builds me'
O
Observation
अवलोकन

Watching and noticing how the words you choose physically affect your body, posture, and confidence level.

तपाईंले छनोट गर्ने शब्दहरूले तपाईंको शरीर र आत्मविश्वासमा कस्तो असर पार्छ भनेर ध्यान दिनुहोस्।

How to Apply

  • 1Notice when negative words create tension in your chest
  • 2Observe your posture after positive affirmations
  • 3Journal your physical reactions to your self-talk
R
Repetition
दोहोऱ्याउने

Strengthening your new belief system by consistently and deliberately repeating positive language patterns daily.

सकारात्मक भाषाका ढाँचाहरू दैनिक रूपले दोहोऱ्याएर नयाँ विश्वास प्रणाली निर्माण गर्नुहोस्।

How to Apply

  • 15 minutes of positive affirmations every morning
  • 2Repeat your core belief statement before important decisions
  • 3Write your intention 3 times before sleeping
D
Discipline
अनुशासन

Taking consistent daily action that aligns with your new words and beliefs, even on days when motivation is absent.

प्रेरणा नभए पनि आफ्ना नयाँ शब्द र विश्वाससँग मिल्दो दैनिक कदम उठाउनुहोस्।

How to Apply

  • 1Create non-negotiable daily micro-habits
  • 2Act first, wait for motivation second
  • 3Track your actions — not your feelings

The Ultimate Equation

W.O.R.DL=WORLD

L = Learning + Leverage

Read the Full Book — NPR 499
W
Decoding The Words

शब्दले संसार बदल्छ — तपाईंको शब्द, तपाईंको संसार। Master the practical application of Wisdom, Observation, Repetition, and Discipline to build the life you truly desire. By Er. Sailesh Acharya.
